---
title: "Documentaries"
description: "Documentaries related to the Narin Güran case."
image: cover.webp
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, author, date, description]
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  feed: false
---
